rules.title: Crisis Alert - Immediate Support Needed
rules.description: Extremely severe depression or anxiety requiring immediate intervention
actions: Walk-in to Student Wellness Centre - Bangunan D, Level 2

rules.title: Time Management & Stress Relief Support
rules.description: Moderate stress with mild depression or anxiety

rules.title: Mood Management & Wellness Tips
rules.description: Mild depression with normal anxiety and stress

rules.title: Excellent Psychological Well-Being
rules.description: Normal depression and anxiety with mild or normal stress
actions: Support peers with their mental health

rules.title: Triple Moderate Escalation
rules.description: All three subscales at moderate level

rules.title: Exam Period Stress Management
rules.description: Moderate or severe stress during exam period

rules.title: Repeat High-Risk Escalation
rules.description: Previous HIGH/CRITICAL assessment with current mild or worse symptoms

resources.title: Clinical Guide to DASS-21
resources.author: Lovibond & Lovibond
resources.description: Comprehensive guide explaining the DASS-21 assessment, scoring, and interpretation of results. Covers clinical significance thresholds and limitations.

resources.title: Evidence-Based Treatments for Anxiety
resources.author: Prof. Halim Ibrahim
resources.description: Overview of empirically supported treatments for anxiety disorders, including CBT, exposure therapy, and medication options. Includes case examples.

resources.title: Sleep Hygiene Tips for Mental Health
resources.author: Dr. Evelyn Wong (Lead Counselor)
resources.description: Practical advice for improving sleep quality as a cornerstone of mental health. Includes bedtime routine suggestions and environmental modifications.

resources.title: Stress Management Through Mindfulness
resources.author: Dr. Amelia Chen
resources.description: Introduction to mindfulness and meditation practices for stress reduction. Includes 5-10 minute guided exercises for daily use.

resources.title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) Fundamentals
resources.author: Prof. Halim Ibrahim
resources.description: Self-paced introduction to CBT principles and techniques. Teaches cognitive restructuring, behavioral activation, and thought records.

resources.title: Building Resilience and Coping Skills
resources.author: Dr. Evelyn Wong (Lead Counselor)
resources.description: Interactive workbook for developing personal resilience, identifying coping strategies, and building a support network.
